optional.status: active|retired (missing = active). Retired queries are skipped by audit.sh and excluded from dashboard aggregates; their trend.csv history is preserved.
optional.added_date: YYYY-MM-DD when the query was added (recorded on additions going forward).
optional.retired_date: YYYY-MM-DD when the query was retired.

rules: Never reuse a retired ID — pick the next unused integer.
Never edit the text of an existing ID. To change wording, retire the old ID and add a new one with a new ID.
